title: 12/12/12 is just 2 Weeks Away + A Giveaway
excerpt: It only happens once every 100 years---the date 12/12/12. How will you remember it? Join Stacy Julian from Big Picture Classes and me to make it a day to remember. On Wednesday, December 12, Stacy Julian and I along with…
body:
It only happens once every 100 years---the date 12/12/12. How will you remember it? Join Stacy Julian from Big Picture Classes and me to make it a day to remember. On Wednesday, December 12, Stacy Julian and I along with 24 other scrapbookers will join together on the beautiful island of Maui, Hawaii to complete a scrapbook album that commemorates life, right now, in 2012 plus bonus projects using Amy Tangerine products from American Crafts. But you don’t need to travel to Hawaii to celebrate with us!

Hundreds of scrapbookers, from Minneapolis to Madrid will come together online for the 12/12/12 at Home portion of the event.

For 12 straight hours beginning at 2 pm EST, you’ll enjoy live, streaming video instruction direct from Big Picture Classes’ Hawaiian classroom. Each hour will bring you 12 minutes of streaming instruction followed by 48 minutes to carry out what you've learned, plus continuous access to your fellow participants via our exclusive message board and gallery. At the end of the day, you'll have a completed a personalized Sn@p mini-album packed full of your favorite memories from 2012.

Register in advance for the online portion of the event for just $20.12

It’s limited to the first 12,000,000 people to complete checkout (in other words, it's unlimited!) But, you’ll want to register now.

so you can get all the information you need to prepare for the event. There are photos to select and print, journaling prompts to complete, and of course, a supply list full of items to purchase so you can create your album as you follow along with Stacy. More information including registration is available at Big Picture Classes.

SPECIAL DISCOUNT: Big Picture wants to give you a special $5 off discount (bringing the at home portion to just $15.12) with the promo code: amy12

GIVEAWAY: Up for grabs are 2 spots for the at home portion! To enter, leave a comment by Friday, November 30th at 6:00am and

2 winners will selected and announced shortly after. UPDATED: The winners are #1 - Cathy L & #63 - Laura A! CONGRATS LADIES! If you've already registered, a credit will be given or you can gift the spot to a friend. There are 2 spots being given away on American Crafts' blog as well. Mahalo!
